_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the formula-prefix sub-cause of branch 5 in the excel-activities/write-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (COMException 0x800A03EC Application-defined or object-defined error from Range.set_Value during the Write Range dispatch) → jobs logs (DataTable marshal Trace exposes the offending row: row 43 column 'FullName' contains the literal value '=Smith, John' — leading equals sign triggers Excel COM formula parsing) → workflow source. The leading-equals cell value is the smoking gun.
